subject: refactor(debug): rewrite DebugPill to match glow-props spec
body:
Rewrites the debug pill to align with the spec from glow-props/CLAUDE.md:

- Separate React root (debug-root div) so the pill survives App crashes
- Centralized debugLog.ts event store: circular buffer of 200 entries with
  pub/sub, source tags (boot/db/graph/graphData/pwa/render/global/seed),
  and severity levels (info/success/warn/error)
- Module-level console.error/warn interception and window.onerror hooks
  installed at import time, before React mounts
- Two-tab expanded UI: Log (scrollable, color-coded by source & severity,
  auto-scrolls to newest, timestamps as HH:MM:SS.mmm) and Environment
  (URL, user agent, screen/viewport, online, protocol, standalone, SW
  support, IndexedDB support)
- Collapsed pill shows "dbg" label with entry count plus error/warning badges
- Copy generates full debug report (environment + all entries) with textarea
  fallback; Clear wipes all entries

Tags: ui, debug, dx, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-tooling
Semver: minor

title: rewrite DebugPill to match glow-props spec
